blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
